# FlipAEO - Strategic Content Engine for Generative Engine Optimization

> FlipAEO is an AI-powered Strategic Content Engine designed for Generative Engine Optimization (GEO). We help businesses create authority-building content that AI search engines cite and recommend.

## About FlipAEO

FlipAEO transforms how businesses approach content marketing in the age of AI search. Our platform automatically generates high-quality, research-backed articles optimized for visibility in AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude, and Google AI Overviews.

## Core Features

### AI-Powered Content Generation
- 30 AI-generated articles per month
- Multi-stage research with real-time web data
- Verified citations from authoritative sources
- Answer-first content structure optimized for AI visibility

### Automated Content Strategy
- Competitor analysis and content gap identification
- 30-day content planning based on search intent
- Google Search Console integration for data-driven decisions
- Smart internal linking suggestions

### CMS Integration
- 1-click publishing to WordPress
- Webflow integration
- Shopify blog publishing
- Custom webhooks for other platforms

### Brand Voice Learning
- Upload your brand guidelines
- AI learns and maintains your unique voice
- Consistent tone across all articles

## Pricing

**All-in-One Plan: $59/month**
- 30 AI-generated articles per month
- Automated content strategy
- CMS integration (WordPress, Webflow, Shopify)
- On-brand AI images
- Smart internal linking
- Real-time research with citations
- Priority support
- 14-day money-back guarantee

## How GEO Works

Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) is the practice of creating content that AI search engines will cite and recommend when users ask questions. Unlike traditional SEO that focuses on keyword rankings, GEO focuses on:

1. **Authority Building**: Creating content that establishes expertise
2. **Information Gain**: Providing unique insights not found elsewhere
3. **Answer-First Structure**: Formatting content for quick AI comprehension
4. **Verified Citations**: Including authoritative sources that AI can verify

## API & Integrations

FlipAEO integrates with:
- Google Search Console (read-only access for content planning)
- WordPress REST API
- Webflow CMS API
- Shopify Admin API
- Custom webhooks
